summary: ARS 1000 PDC v2 Migration Testing Complete - All 5 features verified. Backend certification dashboard and analytics endpoints correctly read from pdc_v2 collection. Frontend Certification tab shows new Score Ombrage ARS 1000 panel (67.5/100, 14 especes, 1 PDC conforme). PDC tab shows enriched stats (total, brouillons, valides). Diagnostic tab reads from /api/pdc-v2/list with 8 fiche checks (F1-F7) mapped to PDC v2 structure.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend ars1000_certification.py: dashboard endpoint correctly reads from pdc_v2 collection (lines 177-224) with 8 fiche completion checks
Backend ars1000_certification.py: Returns score_ombrage_moyen and pdc_conformes_ombrage (lines 289-321) using calculate_shade_score_ars1000
Backend ars1000_analytics.py: stats endpoint reads from pdc_v2 collection (lines 35-116) with correct fiche completion checks
Frontend ARS1000Dashboard.jsx: CertificationTab shows Score Ombrage ARS 1000 panel (lines 124-148) with score moyen, especes, PDC conformes
Frontend ARS1000Dashboard.jsx: DiagnosticConformitePDC reads from /api/pdc-v2/list (line 1605) with 8 fiche checks (lines 1617-1650)
Frontend ARS1000Dashboard.jsx: Fiche labels correctly mapped - F1:Producteur, F2:Exploitation, F2:Arbres, F3:Cacaoyere, F4:Socioeco, F5:Analyse, F6:Planification, F7:Programme
context_for_next_testing_agent: ARS 1000 PDC v2 migration fully tested. Cooperative bielaghana has 7 PDCs in pdc_v2 (1 validated), 46 arbres ombrage, 14 especes, score ombrage moyen 67.5. The certification dashboard API returns these stats. The PDC tab calls /api/pdc-v2/stats/overview and /api/pdc-v2/list. The Diagnostic tab calls /api/pdc-v2/list and checks step1.fiche1-4, step2.fiche5, step3.fiche6-8 for completion.

features: Stats overview (Total PDC, Brouillons, Etape 1, Etape 2-3, Valides)
Taux de remplissage moyen des 8 fiches PDC v2
Remplissage par Fiche (tous planteurs) with 8 progress bars
Diagnostic par Planteur with expandable details
